# gigahost_ssh_key (Resource)

Manages an SSH key on the Gigahost account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Register an SSH public key on the account.
resource "gigahost_ssh_key" "example" {
  key_name = "laptop"
  key_data = "ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIH0Ej3qkY8sJp7m5n9bExampleKeyMaterialOnly user@laptop"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key_data` (String) The OpenSSH public key material.
- `key_name` (String) Label for the SSH key.

### Read-Only

- `key_added` (String) When the key was added (Unix timestamp, string-encoded).
- `key_id` (String) SSH key id.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# SSH keys can be imported by their key id.
terraform import gigahost_ssh_key.example 1925
```
